---
title: "get_dv"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{get_dv}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Intro  

This vignette will go over a few ways on how to use the `ww_dvUSGS()` function. It is essentially the same as `dataRetrieval::readNWISdv()` but adds a few options like `parallel` and `wy_month`. So feel free to use it the same way but remember the output style (`tibble()`) and structure will look different (as it should) albeit the results are the same, i.e. just doing some styling/tidying.  

## Get DV  

Here we're going to get daily values from the USGS station `12304500`. This is the Yaak River, near Troy, MT. A great river to go _whitewater_ kayaking. All we need to do is provide the site id and this will give us the default. The default arguments are

```{r setup}
library(whitewater)
```
